The '''V-1 Thermal Detonator''' was a type of [[thermal detonator]],<ref name="WotF" /> a powerful, [[grenade]]-like explosive device that could be carried in one [[Limb|hand]].<ref name="Detonator DB">{{Databank|thermal-detonator|Thermal Detonator}}</ref> It had a spherical [[Color|gray]] shell, with small ridges along its surface. At one point, a V-1 Thermal Detonator was submerged [[Water|underwater]], in a location surrounded by [[algae]].<ref name="WotF" />

==Behind the scenes==
The V-1 Thermal Detonator was first mentioned in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in a [[weapon]] upgrade card of the same name,<ref name="WotF" /> created for the [[2018]] ''[[Way of the Force]]'' booster pack set. The set was created for the [[Star Wars: Destiny|''Star Wars'': Destiny]] card and dice game,<ref name="Finding the Way">{{FFGweb|url=en/news/2018/7/5/finding-the-way|text=Finding the Way}}</ref> published by [[Fantasy Flight Games]] in [[2016]].<ref name="Announce">{{SW|url=news/characters-collide-in-star-wars-destiny-from-fantasy-flight-games-exclusive|text=Characters Collide in ''Star Wars: Destiny'' from Fantasy Flight Games - Exclusive!}}</ref> The card was illustrated by [[Lukasz Jaskolski]].<ref name="WotF" />

The V-1 Thermal Detonator [[V-1 thermal detonator|originated]] in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, and first appeared, albeit unnamed, in [[Pandemic Studios]]' ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]],<ref name="Battlefront">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref> published by [[LucasArts]] on [[September 21]], [[2004]].<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> It was later identified in the ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide]]'',<ref name="Battlefront Prima">[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] on [[September 28]], 2004.<ref name="Cargo Bay">{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/15995|text=Battlefront : Prima Official Game Guide}}</ref>
